Simple, Transparent Pricing

No hidden fees, no surprises. Choose the plan that fits your business and scale as you grow.

Starter

Perfect for new businesses with simple needs

$199/month
  • Up to 100 transactions/month
  • Monthly bank reconciliation
  • Basic financial reports
  • Email support
  • 1 bank account
  • Accounts payable tracking
  • Accounts receivable tracking
  • Quarterly reviews
Get Started
Most Popular

Growth

Ideal for growing small businesses

$349/month
  • Up to 300 transactions/month
  • Monthly bank reconciliation
  • Detailed financial reports
  • Priority email support
  • Up to 3 bank accounts
  • Accounts payable tracking
  • Accounts receivable tracking
  • Quarterly reviews
Get Started

Professional

For established businesses needing full service

$549/month
  • Unlimited transactions
  • Monthly bank reconciliation
  • Comprehensive financial reports
  • Priority phone & email support
  • Unlimited bank accounts
  • Full AP/AR management
  • Quarterly business reviews
  • Tax preparation support

Additional Services

Need something extra? These add-ons can be combined with any plan.

Cleanup Service

Custom quote

Get your historical books organized and up-to-date

One-time fee based on months behind and complexity

QuickBooks Setup

$199

Complete account setup tailored to your business

One-time fee includes 1-hour training session

Catch-up Bookkeeping

$99/month

Monthly catch-up for businesses falling behind

Per additional month of catch-up work

1099 Preparation

$25

End-of-year 1099 preparation and filing support

Per 1099 form (Professional plan includes first 5)

Frequently Asked Questions

How do I know which plan is right for me?

During our free consultation, we'll review your business needs, transaction volume, and complexity to recommend the best plan. You can always upgrade or downgrade as your business changes.

Are there any setup fees?

No setup fees for ongoing monthly service! If you need historical cleanup or QuickBooks setup, those are one-time charges listed in our add-ons.

What if I go over my transaction limit?

We'll notify you if you're approaching your limit. You can upgrade to the next plan or pay a small overage fee per additional transaction.

Can I cancel anytime?

Yes! Monthly plans can be canceled with 30 days notice. There are no long-term contracts or cancellation fees.

Do you offer discounts for annual payment?

Yes! Pay annually and receive one month free — that's 12 months for the price of 11.

Still Have Questions?

Let's chat about your specific needs and find the perfect solution.

Schedule a Free Consultation
